nasb.text: Please, let us make a little walled upper chamber and let us set a bed for him there, and a table and a chair and a lampstand; and it shall be, when he comes to us, that he can turn in there.”

esv.text: Let us make a small room on the roof with walls and put there for him a bed, a table, a chair, and a lamp, so that whenever he comes to us, he can go in there.”

cnv.text: 讓我們蓋一間有牆的小閣，為他在裡面擺設睡床、桌子、椅子和燈盞；他到我們這裡來的時候，就可以到那裡休息。”

ccb.text: 不如我们在房顶上给他盖一间小屋，里面放床、桌子、椅子和灯。这样，他来我们家时，可以在那里休息。”
